products.name: Foaming Facial Cleanser
products.description: Gentle foaming cleanser for oily & acne-prone skin. Ceramides, hyaluronic acid & niacinamide remove oil/dirt/makeup while protecting the barrier.

products.name: Hydrating Facial Cleanser
products.description: Creamy cleanser for dry & sensitive skin. Ceramides & hyaluronic acid gently remove makeup while protecting the barrier. Eczema Association approved.

products.name: Moisturizing Cream
products.description: Rich 24-hour moisturizer for dry skin. Ceramides & MVE Technology deliver continuous hydration & barrier repair.

products.name: AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion SPF 30
products.description: Daily moisturizer with SPF 30. Oil-free, lightweight formula hydrates & protects from UVA/UVB without white cast.

products.name: PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Night moisturizer. Ultra-light formula with ceramides & hyaluronic acid for overnight repair & continuous hydration.

products.name: Resurfacing Retinol Serum
products.description: Retinol serum to smooth texture & fade acne marks. Encapsulated retinol boosts cell turnover & refines pores.

products.name: Skin Renewing Vitamin C Serum
products.description: Brightening serum with 10% vitamin C & ceramides. Boosts radiance, evens tone & improves fine lines.

products.name: Eye Repair Cream
products.description: Eye cream to reduce dark circles & puffiness. Marine complex & hyaluronic acid brighten delicate eye area.

products.name: Renewing SA Cleanser
products.description: Exfoliating cleanser with salicylic acid. Removes dead skin & softens texture without drying thanks to ceramides & niacinamide.

products.name: Toleriane Hydrating Gentle Cleanser
products.description: Soap-free cleanser for sensitive skin. Thermal water, ceramides & glycerin gently cleanse without drying.

products.name: Anthelios Ultra-Light Fluid Face Sunscreen SPF 60
products.description: Ultra-light SPF 60 sunscreen. Fast-absorbing, invisible finish, water-resistant 40 min. Works under makeup.

products.name: Effaclar Duo Dual Acne Treatment
products.description: Acne treatment with benzoyl peroxide. Clears breakouts, prevents blemishes & refines texture without over-drying.

products.name: Minéral 89 Hyaluronic Acid Booster
products.description: Lightweight booster with 89% volcanic mineral water & hyaluronic acid. Quick-absorbing, deeply hydrating, non-sticky.

products.name: Aqualia Thermal Rich Cream
products.description: Rich moisturizer for dry, sensitive skin. 97% natural ingredients with hyaluronic acid for 48-hour hydration.

products.name: Revitalift 1.5% Hyaluronic Acid Serum
products.description: Lightweight serum with 1.5% hyaluronic acid & vitamin C. Instantly replenishes moisture & visibly plumps skin.

products.name: Elvive Total Repair 5 Shampoo
products.description: Repairing shampoo for split ends & weakness. Protein & ceramides fortify hair & add shine.

products.name: Voluminous Original Mascara (Carbon Black)
products.description: Volumizing mascara. 5× fuller lashes with panthenol & ceramides. Rich black pigment, no clumping.

products.name: Infallible Fresh Wear Foundation (24H)
products.description: 24-hour foundation with medium-to-full coverage. Resists sweat, water & transfer with fresh matte finish.

products.name: Fit Me Matte + Poreless Foundation
products.description: Matte foundation for oily skin. Micro-powders absorb oil & minimize pores with medium buildable coverage.

products.name: Lash Sensational Mascara
products.description: Volumizing mascara with fanning brush. Captures & separates every lash for layered volume without clumping.

products.name: Advanced Génifique Youth Activating Serum
products.description: Anti-aging serum. Bifidus prebiotic & hyaluronic acid boost radiance & elasticity in 7 days.

products.name: Teint Idole Ultra Wear Foundation
products.description: 24-hour foundation with full coverage & natural matte finish. Transfer-resistant oil absorbers, 50+ shades.

products.name: SkinActive Micellar Cleansing Water
products.description: All-in-one micellar water. Removes makeup & dirt without rinsing. Oil-free & dermatologist-tested.

products.name: Fructis Sleek & Shine Shampoo
products.description: Smoothing shampoo that tames frizz for 72 hours. Argan oil & keratin nourish & strengthen strands.

products.name: Ultra Facial Cream
products.description: Daily moisturizer with 24-hour hydration. Squalane & glacial glycoprotein strengthen barrier for all skin types.

products.name: Nutritive Bain Satin 1 Shampoo
products.description: Nourishing shampoo for dry hair. Plant proteins & Irisome Complex infuse strands with softness & shine.

products.name: C E Ferulic Antioxidant Serum

products.name: Rouge Volupté Shine Lipstick Balm

products.name: All Soft Conditioner

products.name: Excellence Crème Permanent Triple Care Hair Color
products.description: Hair color with Pro-Keratine Complex. 100% gray coverage with 8-week protection & after-color shampoo.

products.description: Extra-strong hold hairspray that resists humidity. Touchable finish with UV protection, no stickiness.
